meaning: n.末端,极端,极度,穷困,绝境,临死,非常手段,手足
examples: In spite of the extremity of her seclusion she was sane.
The lake is situated at the eastern extremity of the mountain range.
In her extremity, an instinct told her to which of them to turn.
Mr. CRAIG DeMARTINO (Gold Medal Winner, Extremity Games): Thank you very much for having me.
For his part, Craig DeMartino won two gold medals at the Extremity Games and he's in Greeley, Colorado.
